research_images.relevance:
"The use of microservices provides increased scalability and fault tolerance since individual service failures do not affect the entire system."
 https://blog.percolate.io/microservices-can-help-easily-deploy-to-production/

"Modular design helps ensure that changes can be made to individual services without affecting the rest of the system."
 https://blog.percolate.io/microservices-can-help-easily-deploy-to-production/

summary:
Designing microservices can be done modular which improves scalability and flexibility.
 The main advantage of the modular model is that it allows for easier deployment to production.
